visual_description: The audio opens with a tense and suspenseful electronic score, creating a mood of high-stakes drama and anticipation. A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt. He stares intently forward with a serious and determined expression. The background is dark and out of focus, with a soft light source illuminating his face from the side. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera cuts to a close-up of a hand in a dark suit jacket. The hand is clenched into a fist, and a large, ornate ring is visible on the ring finger. The background is completely dark, isolating the hand. The white Chinese text remains in the top left corner. The camera pulls back to a medium shot of the same man, now seen from the side. He is in a dimly lit office environment, looking off-screen with a concerned expression. In the background, other people are working at computers, and a wall with framed photos is visible. The white Chinese text is still present. The shot tightens again to a close-up of the man's face from a low angle. He raises his clenched fist to his face, his expression one
